props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the legend item

props.name: name
props.description: Display name for the legend item

props.name: value
props.description: Value associated with the legend item

props.name: percentage
props.description: Optional percentage value for the legend item

props.name: color
props.description: Optional color for the legend item

props.name: hidden
props.description: Whether the legend item is hidden
